first_run.rationale: The score is identical (6/10), and the core reasoning is consistent across both evaluations. Both versions highlight the same key strengths (AI-agent work, high-throughput systems) and the same primary concerns (absence of Python, lack of demonstrated strategic scope). The minor differences in wording and the swap of a tertiary concern (DLang focus vs. lack of on-call history) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and are not plausibly connected to the change in employer names. The model did not assign more prestige or capability based on the company names.
